title: Đề số 1 – Tiếng Anh vào lớp 10
description: Đề thi thử Tiếng Anh tuyển sinh lớp 10 – 40 câu trắc nghiệm

sections.title: Mark the letter A, B, C, or D on your answer sheet to indicate the word whose underlined part differs from the other three in pronunciation in each of the following questions.

questions.text: Choose the word whose underlined part differs from the other three in pronunciation.

explanation_json.detail: 'ghost' phát âm /oʊ/ (âm đôi), trong khi 'office' /ɒ/, 'long' /ɒ/, 'modern' /ɒ/ đều phát âm /ɒ/.
explanation_json.tip: Chú ý: 'gh' trong 'ghost' là âm câm, 'o' phát âm là /oʊ/.

questions.text: Choose the word whose underlined part differs from the other three in pronunciation.

explanation_json.detail: 'chemistry' phát âm /k/, trong khi 'teach' /tʃ/, 'speech' /tʃ/, 'exchange' /tʃ/ đều phát âm /tʃ/.
explanation_json.tip: Từ gốc Hy Lạp thường có 'ch' phát âm /k/: chemistry, character, chorus.

sections.title: Mark the letter A, B, C, or D on your answer sheet to indicate the word that differs from the other three in the position of primary stress in each of the following questions.

questions.text: Choose the word that differs from the other three in the position of primary stress.

explanation_json.detail: 'danger' nhấn âm 1 /ˈdeɪn.dʒər/, trong khi 'control' /kənˈtroʊl/, 'apply' /əˈplaɪ/, 'provide' /prəˈvaɪd/ đều nhấn âm 2.
explanation_json.tip: Danh từ 2 âm tiết thường nhấn âm 1, động từ 2 âm tiết thường nhấn âm 2.

questions.text: Choose the word that differs from the other three in the position of primary stress.

explanation_json.detail: 'reference' nhấn âm 1 /ˈref.ər.əns/, trong khi 'tradition' /trəˈdɪʃ.ən/, 'disaster' /dɪˈzɑː.stər/, 'musician' /mjuˈzɪʃ.ən/ đều nhấn âm 2.
explanation_json.tip: Từ có đuôi -tion, -sion, -ian thường nhấn âm trước đuôi.

sections.title: Mark the letter A, B, C, or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

questions.text: Many children _______ to the city zoo last week.

explanation_json.detail: 'last week' là dấu hiệu của thì quá khứ đơn. 'go' → 'went' (bất quy tắc). 'goed' không tồn tại.
explanation_json.tip: Các trạng từ: last week, yesterday, ago, in 2020 → dùng quá khứ đơn.

questions.text: Tony works for your company, _______?

explanation_json.detail: Câu chính dùng 'works' (hiện tại đơn, khẳng định) → câu hỏi đuôi phải là phủ định 'doesn't he'.
explanation_json.tip: Quy tắc: Câu chính khẳng định → tag phủ định, và ngược lại. Dùng cùng thì với câu chính.

questions.text: Laura is _______ than any other student in my class.

explanation_json.detail: 'than' là dấu hiệu so sánh hơn. 'intelligent' có 4 âm tiết → dùng 'more intelligent'. Không dùng 'the most' (so sánh nhất) hay 'as...as' (so sánh bằng).
explanation_json.tip: Tính từ dài (≥3 âm tiết): more + adj + than.

questions.text: The doctor advised me _______ too late at night.

explanation_json.rule: Cấu trúc advise + O + (not) to V
explanation_json.detail: 'advise sb (not) to do sth'. Bác sĩ khuyên KHÔNG nên thức khuya → 'not to stay up'.
explanation_json.tip: Tương tự: ask/tell/want/remind sb (not) to do sth.

questions.text: Tomorrow we'll go to Noi Bai Airport to meet Alisa, _______ comes from Malaysia.

explanation_json.detail: 'who' thay thế cho 'Alisa' (người) làm chủ ngữ trong mệnh đề quan hệ. Không dùng 'that' sau dấu phẩy (mệnh đề quan hệ không xác định).
explanation_json.tip: Sau dấu phẩy → mệnh đề không xác định → chỉ dùng who/whom/which, KHÔNG dùng that.

questions.text: If you come to England, it will be a good _______ for you to improve your English.

explanation_json.detail: 'a good opportunity for sb to do sth' = cơ hội tốt để ai đó làm gì. 'advantage' = lợi thế. 'experience' = trải nghiệm. 'possibility' = khả năng.
explanation_json.tip: Collocation phổ biến: opportunity + to V / for sb / of doing sth.

questions.text: _______ in big cities is controlled by red, yellow, and green lights.

explanation_json.detail: 'Traffic' = giao thông, được điều khiển bởi đèn đỏ, vàng, xanh. 'Transportation' = phương tiện giao thông (khái niệm rộng hơn). 'Delivery' = giao hàng. 'Communication' = giao tiếp.
explanation_json.tip: Traffic lights / traffic rules / traffic jam là các collocations thường gặp.

sections.title: Mark the letter A, B, C, or D on your answer sheet to indicate the most suitable response to complete the following exchange.

questions.text:
Jonathan is talking with his friend.
Jonathan: "I've passed my final exam with high marks."
Joan: "_______"

explanation_json.detail: Khi ai đó báo tin vui (đậu thi điểm cao), ta dùng 'Congratulations!' để chúc mừng.
explanation_json.tip: Phản hồi tin vui: Congratulations! / Well done! / Great job!

sections.title: Read the following announcement and mark the letter A, B, C, or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct word or phrase that best fits each of the numbered blanks from 13 to 16.
sections.passage_text:
MEKONG DELTA ECOTOUR
Join our (13) _______ tour to explore the Mekong Delta:
- Cai Be Floating Market: (14) _______ the daily life of the people on the river.
- Cham River Village: Visit a weaving workshop and learn about local people's (15) _______ skills.
- Arts and crafts market: Buy locally made souvenirs.
- Evening meal: Enjoy traditional foods which (16) _______ by the host family.

questions.text: Join our (13) _______ tour to explore the Mekong Delta.

explanation_json.detail: 'eco-friendly tour' = tour du lịch thân thiện môi trường. Phù hợp với 'ECOTOUR' trong tiêu đề.
explanation_json.tip: eco-friendly = thân thiện với môi trường. environmentally-friendly cũng đúng nghĩa nhưng eco-friendly phù hợp ngữ cảnh ecotour hơn.

questions.text: (14) _______ the daily life of the people on the river.

explanation_json.detail: 'Observe' = quan sát. Đi chợ nổi để 'quan sát' cuộc sống hàng ngày. 'Discover' = khám phá. 'Experience' = trải nghiệm.
explanation_json.tip: Observe the daily life = quan sát cuộc sống thường nhật.

questions.text: learn about local people's (15) _______ skills.

explanation_json.detail: 'weaving skills' = kỹ năng dệt. Cần V-ing đứng trước danh từ làm tính từ.
explanation_json.tip: V-ing + noun: swimming pool, writing skills, reading habits.

questions.text: Enjoy traditional foods which (16) _______ by the host family.

explanation_json.detail: Thông báo mô tả lịch trình (hiện tại) + 'foods' là chủ thể bị nấu → bị động 'are cooked'.
explanation_json.tip: Câu bị động: S + be + V3/ed + by + O.

sections.title: Put the sentences in the correct order to make a meaningful text.

questions.text:
Vong, a small village in Ha Noi, is famous for its speciality: com (young sticky rice flakes). To make com, artisans follow a series of steps. _______

a. They wrap the final product in two layers of leaves to preserve its fragrance before selling it to consumers.
b. They preserve the techniques by passing them down to their sons.
c. In the past, people made com by hand, but now they use machines for some steps to shorten the process.

explanation_json.detail: b → bảo tồn kỹ thuật truyền cho con trai → c → xưa làm tay, nay dùng máy rút ngắn quy trình → a → bước cuối: gói sản phẩm trong lá sen bán cho khách. Thứ tự: b-c-a.
explanation_json.tip: Đọc câu đầu (topic sentence) rồi sắp xếp theo trình tự thời gian/logic.

sections.title: Choose the sentence that can end the text (in Question 17) most appropriately.

questions.text: Choose the sentence that can end the text (in Question 17) most appropriately.

choices.text: Firstly, Com is famous speciality of HaNoi autumn.
However, Com Lang Vong still famous for its speciality of HaNoi autumn.
Com Lang Vong is well known in Viet Nam as a speciality of HaNoi autumn.
Then people should enjoy Com because it is a famous speciality of Ha Noi autumn.

explanation_json.detail: Câu C là câu tổng kết phù hợp nhất: khẳng định Cốm Làng Vòng nổi tiếng là đặc sản mùa thu Hà Nội. Không dùng 'However' (C) vì không có ý đối lập.
explanation_json.tip: Câu kết thường tổng kết ý chính, không thêm ý mới hay đối lập.

sections.title: Read the following passage and mark the letter A, B, C, or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct word or phrase that best fits each of the numbered blanks from 19 to 24.
sections.passage_text:
Singapore is an island city of about three million people. It's a beautiful city with lots of parks and open spaces. It's also a very (19) _______ city.
Most of the people live in (20) _______ flats in different parts of the island. The business district is very modern with (21) _______ high new office buildings. Singapore also has some nice older sections. In Chinatown, there (22) _______ rows of old shop houses. The government buildings in Singapore are very beautiful and date from the colonial days. Singapore is famous (23) _______ its shops and restaurants. There are many good shopping centers. Most of the goods are duty free. Singapore's restaurants sell Chinese, Indian, Malay and European food, and the prices are quite (24) _______.

questions.text: It's also a very (19) _______ city.

explanation_json.detail: Đoạn văn mô tả Singapore đẹp, nhiều công viên → 'clean' (sạch sẽ) phù hợp nhất.
explanation_json.tip: Đọc câu trước và sau để xác định nghĩa phù hợp.

questions.text: Most of the people live in (20) _______ flats.

explanation_json.detail: 'high-rise flats' = chung cư cao tầng. 'tail-rise' không tồn tại. 'skyscraper' là danh từ. 'low-rise' = thấp tầng.
explanation_json.tip: high-rise (adj) = cao tầng. skyscraper (n) = tòa nhà chọc trời.

questions.text: very modern with (21) _______ high new office buildings.

explanation_json.detail: 'lots of' + danh từ đếm được số nhiều (buildings). 'lot' cần 'a lot of'. 'much' dùng cho danh từ không đếm được.
explanation_json.tip: lots of = a lot of, dùng cho cả đếm được và không đếm được.

questions.text: In Chinatown, there (22) _______ rows of old shop houses.

explanation_json.detail: 'rows' (số nhiều) → 'there are'. Đoạn văn dùng thì hiện tại đơn (mô tả sự thật).
explanation_json.tip: There is + singular noun. There are + plural noun.

questions.text: Singapore is famous (23) _______ its shops and restaurants.

explanation_json.detail: 'be famous for' = nổi tiếng về/vì. Đây là cụm cố định.
explanation_json.tip: famous for sth, interested in sth, good at sth, worried about sth.

questions.text: the prices are quite (24) _______.

explanation_json.detail: 'reasonable prices' = giá cả hợp lý. 'attractive' = hấp dẫn (dùng cho giá được nhưng 'reasonable' chính xác hơn). 'comfortable' = thoải mái (không dùng cho giá). 'enjoyable' = thú vị (không dùng cho giá).
explanation_json.tip: reasonable prices = giá cả hợp lý, phải chăng. Collocation phổ biến.

sections.title: Mark the letter A, B, C, or D on your answer sheet to indicate the sentence that is closest in meaning to each of the following questions.

questions.text: "Where do you usually spend your holiday?" he asked me.

choices.text: He asked me where I usually spent my holiday.
He asked me where I did usually spent my holiday.
He asked me if I usually spent my holiday.
He asked me where did I usually spent my holiday.

explanation_json.detail: Câu hỏi Wh- → He asked me + Wh-word + S + V (lùi thì). 'spend' → 'spent'. Không đảo ngữ trong tường thuật.
explanation_json.tip: Wh-question → S + asked + Wh + S + V (lùi thì, không dùng trợ động từ).

questions.text: It's two years since I last spoke to her.

choices.text: I haven't spoke to her for two years.
I haven't spoken to her since two years.
I haven't spoken to her for two years ago.
I haven't spoken to her for two years.

explanation_json.detail: 'It's two years since...' = đã 2 năm kể từ khi... = I haven't + V3 + for + khoảng thời gian. 'spoke' → 'spoken' (V3). Dùng 'for two years' (không dùng 'since two years' hay 'for...ago').
explanation_json.tip: since + mốc thời gian (since 2019). for + khoảng thời gian (for two years).

sections.title: Mark the letter A, B, C, or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct sentence that is made from the given cues.

questions.text: Due / bad weather, / flight / Ha Noi/ put off.

choices.text: Due to the bad weather, the flight to Ha Noi was put off.
Due to the bad weather, the flight to Ha Noi was taken off.
Due to the bad weather, the flight to Ha Noi was turned up.
Due to the bad weather, the flight to Ha Noi was put on.

explanation_json.detail: 'put off' = hoãn lại. 'Due to + N' = vì. Câu bị động: 'the flight was put off' (chuyến bay bị hoãn). 'taken off' = cất cánh. 'turned up' = xuất hiện. 'put on' = mặc (quần áo).
explanation_json.tip: put off = postpone = hoãn lại. Chú ý nghĩa phrasal verbs.

questions.text: Minh / spend / 2 hours / do / homework / every day.

choices.text: Minh spends 2 hours to do his homework every day.
It spends 2 hours doing his homework every day.
Minh spends 2 hours for doing his homework every day.
Minh spends 2 hours doing his homework every day.

explanation_json.detail: 'S + spend(s) + time + V-ing + sth' = dành thời gian làm gì. Không dùng 'to do' hay 'for doing'.
explanation_json.tip: spend time/money (on sth / V-ing). KHÔNG dùng: spend... to V.

sections.title: Read the following signs/notices and mark the letter A, B, C, or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each question.

questions.text:
What does the sign say?
[Sign: WET PAINT – Don't TOUCH]

choices.text: The paint is dry and safe to touch.
The paint is still wet, so please do not touch it.
You are encouraged to touch the paint.
The paint is not for public use.

explanation_json.detail: 'WET PAINT – Don't Touch' = Sơn ướt – Không chạm. Cảnh báo sơn chưa khô, đừng sờ vào.
explanation_json.tip: WET PAINT là biển cảnh báo phổ biến ở nơi mới sơn.

questions.text:
What does the notice say?
[Notice: MUSIC CLUB STARTING AGAIN SOON – First meeting next Thurs 4 pm – Come and join us!]

choices.text: You have to join the club before you can go to the first meeting.
Anyone can go along to the music club next Thursday.
There is a new music club beginning soon that you can attend.
After the first meeting, we can start the music club again.

explanation_json.detail: 'Come and join us!' = mời mọi người tham gia. Buổi họp đầu tiên vào thứ 5 tới lúc 4 giờ chiều. Ai cũng có thể đến.
explanation_json.tip: 'Come and join us' = lời mời mở, bất kỳ ai cũng được.

sections.title: Read the following passage and mark the letter A, B, C, or D on your answer sheet to indicate the correct answer to each of the questions from 31 to 36.
sections.passage_text:
Protecting the environment is very important for our planet. We need to take care of nature to keep the Earth clean and healthy. There are many simple things we can do to help the environment. For example, we can recycle paper, plastic, and glass. Recycling helps to reduce waste and save resources. Another way to protect the environment is to save water. We should turn off the tap when brushing our teeth and take shorter showers. Also, using less electricity can help. Turning off lights when we do not need them and using energy-efficient bulbs can make a big difference.

In addition, planting trees is also very good for the environment. Trees clean the air and provide homes for animals. They also help to keep the climate stable. We can all plant a tree in our garden or join a community tree-planting event. Using public transport, walking, or riding a bike instead of driving a car helps reduce pollution. Cars produce a lot of harmful gases that pollute the air. By choosing other ways to travel, we can keep the air clean and reduce our carbon footprint. Everyone can help protect the environment. By making small changes in our daily lives, we can make a big difference for our planet.
sections.passage_instruction: Read the following passage and mark the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions from 31 to 36.

questions.text: What is the main idea of the passage?

explanation_json.detail: Bài nói về nhiều cách bảo vệ môi trường: tái chế, tiết kiệm nước, điện, trồng cây, dùng phương tiện công cộng → ý chính là 'Ways to protect the environment'.
explanation_json.tip: Ý chính thường bao quát tất cả các ý phụ trong bài.

questions.text: What does the word "They" in the 2nd paragraph refer to?

explanation_json.detail: Đoạn 2: 'planting trees... Trees clean the air... They also help...' → 'They' thay thế cho 'Trees'.
explanation_json.tip: Đọc câu trước đại từ để tìm danh từ mà nó thay thế.

questions.text: The word "stable" in the 2nd paragraph is CLOSEST in meaning to _______.

explanation_json.detail: 'stable' = ổn định. 'sustainable' = bền vững, gần nghĩa nhất. 'refillable' = có thể nạp lại. 'eco-friendly' = thân thiện môi trường.
explanation_json.tip: stable ≈ steady, consistent, sustainable.

questions.text: According to the passage, why should we use water efficiently?

explanation_json.detail: Đoạn 1: 'Another way to protect the environment is to save water.' → mục đích tiết kiệm nước là để bảo vệ môi trường (protect the environment).
explanation_json.tip: Tìm từ khóa 'water' trong bài và đọc câu chứa nó để xác định mục đích.

questions.text: Which activity is NOT mentioned as a way to help the environment in the passage?

explanation_json.detail: Bài đề cập: recycling (A), dùng ít điện (A), phương tiện công cộng (B). 'Limiting household waste' KHÔNG được đề cập trực tiếp.
explanation_json.tip: Với câu NOT, loại trừ các đáp án có trong bài.

questions.text: The word "reduce" in the 1st paragraph is OPPOSITE in meaning to _______.

explanation_json.detail: 'reduce' = giảm. Trái nghĩa: 'increase' = tăng.
explanation_json.tip: reduce ↔ increase. decrease ↔ increase.

sections.title: Four phrases/sentences have been removed from the text below. For each question, mark the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the correct option that best fits each of the numbered blanks from 37 to 40.
sections.passage_text:
When I was at school, I had to learn how to have a well-balanced life (37) _______. Below are some of the typical things I did.

Firstly, I managed my time properly. I started to plan my schedule, made a weekly work list and gave priority to some of my work. (38) _______.

In addition, I communicated with my family, friends, and teachers about my busy schedule and problems, so they would offer me additional support.

I also took breaks appropriately because they helped me keep away from stress and anxiety, and gave my brain a rest and improved my mood.

(39) _______. I got at least eight hours of sleep a day. I played football with my classmates twice a week and went for a walk with my grandparents early every morning.

Besides, I also tried to follow a healthy diet. I ate a lot of fruit and vegetables. I ate little fattening foods and (40) _______.
sections.passage_instruction: Four phrases/sentences have been removed from the text below. For each question, mark the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the correct option that best fits each of the numbered blanks from 37 to 40.

questions.text: When I was at school, I had to learn how to have a well-balanced life (37) _______.

choices.text: avoided junk foods like chips, cookies, pizza, etc.
in order to reduce stress and anxiety
Finally, I looked after my physical health.
This helped me concentrate my efforts on my most important tasks.

explanation_json.detail: 'have a well-balanced life (37)' → cần cụm chỉ mục đích. 'in order to reduce stress and anxiety' = để giảm căng thẳng và lo âu.
explanation_json.tip: 'in order to + V' chỉ mục đích, phù hợp sau 'learn how to have a well-balanced life'.

questions.text: (38) _______ [sau khi nói về quản lý thời gian]

choices.text: avoided junk foods like chips, cookies, pizza, etc.
in order to reduce stress and anxiety
Finally, I looked after my physical health.
This helped me concentrate my efforts on my most important tasks.

explanation_json.detail: Sau khi nói về lập kế hoạch, danh sách công việc, ưu tiên → 'This helped me concentrate my efforts on my most important tasks' = Điều này giúp tôi tập trung vào công việc quan trọng nhất.
explanation_json.tip: 'This' ở đầu câu thường chỉ lại ý vừa nêu ở câu trước.

questions.text: (39) _______ [trước khi nói về ngủ đủ giấc, chơi thể thao]

choices.text: avoided junk foods like chips, cookies, pizza, etc.
in order to reduce stress and anxiety
Finally, I looked after my physical health.
This helped me concentrate my efforts on my most important tasks.

explanation_json.detail: Đoạn sau nói về ngủ 8 tiếng, chơi bóng đá, đi bộ → liên quan đến sức khỏe thể chất. 'Finally, I looked after my physical health' là câu chủ đề phù hợp.
explanation_json.tip: 'Finally' cho thấy đây là ý cuối cùng trong danh sách. Nội dung sau phải liên quan đến physical health.

questions.text: I ate little fattening foods and (40) _______.

choices.text: avoided junk foods like chips, cookies, pizza, etc.
in order to reduce stress and anxiety
Finally, I looked after my physical health.
This helped me concentrate my efforts on my most important tasks.

explanation_json.detail: 'ate little fattening foods AND (40)' → cần thêm một hành động ăn uống lành mạnh. 'avoided junk foods like chips, cookies, pizza...' nối tiếp ý liệt kê.
explanation_json.tip: Cấu trúc liệt kê: X and Y. Y phải cùng loại/chủ đề với X.
